name: sema
description: Sema e um Protocolo de Governanca de Intencao para IA e backend vivo, com contrato explicito, drift e scaffold semantico.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --import tsx --test testes/unidade/**/*.test.ts testes/integracao/**/*.test.ts
scripts.cli:instalar-local: npm run build && node scripts/garantir-path-cli-windows.mjs && npm link --workspace @semacode/cli
scripts.cli:empacotar: npm run build && node -e "require('node:fs').mkdirSync('.tmp/pacotes',{recursive:true})" && npm pack --workspace @semacode/cli --pack-destination ./.tmp/pacotes
scripts.release:preparar-publica: npm run project:check && npm run extensao:empacotar && node scripts/preparar-release-publica.mjs
scripts.docs:prepare: npm run status:sync && npm run status:check
scripts.project:check: npm run status:check && npm test && npm run format:check && npm run cli:testar-pacote-publico && node pacotes/cli/dist/index.js verificar exemplos --saida ./.tmp/verificacao-project-check
